---
title: "get_torrent_ranking"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_torrent_ranking()`

Create Torrent Ranking Table

## Usage

```r
get_torrent_ranking(
  token = "FLIX_PATROL",
  torrent_site,
  start_date,
  end_date,
  date_type = "day",
  media_type = NULL
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `token` | Character. API environment variable name. |
| `torrent_site` | Character. Torrent site name (e.g., "1337x") or '"*"' for all. |
| `start_date` | Date/Character. Start of the date range. |
| `end_date` | Date/Character. End of the date range. |
| `date_type` | Character. Date granularity (default '"day"'). |
| `media_type` | Character. Optional media type filter. |

## Value

A tibble of torrent rankings.

## Description

Fetches torrent chart rankings for a given site and date range.
